message:
test(fj-conformance): add oracle tests for Erf (error function)

Adds 17 comprehensive oracle tests covering:
- Special values: 0, 0.5, 1, 2, -1
- Infinity: erf(+inf) = 1, erf(-inf) = -1
- NaN propagation
- Range verification: output in [-1, 1]
- Odd function property: erf(-x) = -erf(x)
- Asymptotic behavior for large values
- Small value approximation: erf(x) ≈ 2x/sqrt(π)
- 1D and 2D tensor shapes
- Monotonicity
- Erfc relationship: erf(x) + erfc(x) = 1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
